title: Larger Emeralds
body:
## What is this?
This resource pack makes emeralds larger when they are dropped. This project was made orginally for playing eggwars on CubeCraft. Please use it as you see fit :D

![Emerald size in game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/375a3f0a98dc0d1f447140ef40ef301623bdd0a3.png)

## Configuration
Lets see how you can change the size of the emerald.

Download the resource pack and navigate to:
![Steps to get to the configuration file.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fed2d8f0c3868f0a9a258c8f1d8f75ff92817a21.png)

Then open emerald.json with notepad:
![You can change emerald size from here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78972213c67e7ee7e8f7b1126e5a156c1ea3342d.png)

Change the size of the emerald from there. Feel free to mess around with the other settings.
